title: Login button should navigate to login page
test_steps: Click on the 'Login' button at the bottom of the screen.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the login page.

title: Sign Up button should navigate to sign up page
test_steps: Click on the 'Sign Up' button at the bottom of the screen.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the sign up page.

title: Header back arrow should navigate to previous screen
test_steps: Click on the back arrow in the header.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the previous screen.

title: Login button should be clickable
test_steps: Click on the 'Login' button at the bottom of the screen.

title: Sign Up button should be clickable
test_steps: Click on the 'Sign Up' button at the bottom of the screen.
expected_result: The 'Sign Up' button should be clickable.

title: Header back arrow should be clickable
test_steps: Click on the back arrow in the header.
expected_result: The back arrow in the header should be clickable.

title: Illustration should be displayed
test_steps: Verify that the illustration of a wallet and a ticket with a percentage symbol is displayed.

title: List of features should be displayed
test_steps: Verify that the list of four features is displayed.
expected_result: The list of four features should be displayed.

title: Login button should not be clickable if not logged in
test_steps: Ensure the user is not logged in. | Click on the 'Login' button at the bottom of the screen.
expected_result: The 'Login' button should not be clickable.

title: Sign Up button should not be clickable if not logged in
test_steps: Ensure the user is not logged in. | Click on the 'Sign Up' button at the bottom of the screen.
expected_result: The 'Sign Up' button should not be clickable.

title: Header back arrow should not be clickable if not logged in
test_steps: Ensure the user is not logged in. | Click on the back arrow in the header.
expected_result: The back arrow in the header should not be clickable.
